overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing the player ascending a wide modern staircase in a neon-lit futuristic city, then walking across an elevated plaza lined with palm trees and holographic billboards. The environment features towering skyscrapers with vibrant digital signage and reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway ascending to elevated plaza

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and exits into the open elevated plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase toward the upper plaza level, flanked by dark walls with orange accent lighting

entered.detail: wide modern stairs with dark steps and illuminated orange edge strips
dark concrete wall with horizontal orange LED accent lighting
dark concrete wall with horizontal orange LED accent lighting
large glowing digital advertisements and neon signage on building facade
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon architectural accents

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide modern staircase enclosed by dark concrete walls with orange LED strips. Above, the glowing holographic billboards and towering cyberpunk skyscrapers of the city are visible against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm tree planters

events.description: begins turning left while continuing to walk across the reflective plaza surface

agents.ego_description: walking across the elevated plaza, turning left while passing large palm tree planters with integrated lighting

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planters containing palm trees with orange LED accent lighting at base
dark wet-look pavement reflecting the neon lights and surrounding buildings
modern concrete bench seating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a wide elevated plaza with reflective dark pavement and large palm tree planters featuring orange accent lighting. The camera turns left while walking, passing modern benches and a pedestrian, with massive holographic billboards and cyberpunk towers dominating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a confined concrete stairwell into a vast, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins with a climb up wide modern stairs enclosed by dark walls and orange LED strips, with the glowing silhouettes of cyberpunk skyscrapers visible against the dusk sky above. As the camera reaches the top, the narrow enclosure opens into a wide elevated plaza characterized by reflective dark pavement and large palm tree planters with orange accent lighting. The scene then expands as the camera turns left while walking, passing modern benches and a pedestrian beneath the towering presence of massive holographic billboards and futuristic towers.
